arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: قَالَ أَلَمْ أَقُل لَّكَ إِنَّكَ لَن تَسْتَطِيعَ مَعِيَ صَبْرًا
english translation text:
He said, ‘Did I not tell you that you cannot have patience with me?’
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: قَالَ إِن سَأَلْتُكَ عَن شَيْءٍ بَعْدَهَا فَلَا تُصَاحِبْنِي ۖ قَدْ بَلَغْتَ مِن لَّدُنِّي عُذْرًا
english translation text:
He said, ‘If I question you about anything after this, do not keep me in your company. You already have enough excuse on my part.’
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: فَانطَلَقَا حَتَّىٰ إِذَا أَتَيَا أَهْلَ قَرْيَةٍ اسْتَطْعَمَا أَهْلَهَا فَأَبَوْا أَن يُضَيِّفُوهُمَا فَوَجَدَا فِيهَا جِدَارًا يُرِيدُ أَن يَنقَضَّ فَأَقَامَهُ ۖ قَالَ لَوْ شِئْتَ لَاتَّخَذْتَ عَلَيْهِ أَجْرًا
english translation text:
So they went on until they came to the people of a town. They asked its people for food, but they refused to extend them any hospitality. There they found a wall which was about to collapse, so he erected it. He said, ‘Had you wished, you could have taken a wage for it.’
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: قَالَ هَٰذَا فِرَاقُ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنِكَ ۚ سَأُنَبِّئُكَ بِتَأْوِيلِ مَا لَمْ تَسْتَطِع عَّلَيْهِ صَبْرًا
english translation text:
He said, ‘This is where you and I shall part. I will inform you about the interpretation of that over which you could not maintain patience.
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: أَمَّا السَّفِينَةُ فَكَانَتْ لِمَسَاكِينَ يَعْمَلُونَ فِي الْبَحْرِ فَأَرَدتُّ أَنْ أَعِيبَهَا وَكَانَ وَرَاءَهُم مَّلِكٌ يَأْخُذُ كُلَّ سَفِينَةٍ غَصْبًا
english translation text:
As for the boat, it belonged to some poor people who work on the sea. I wanted to make it defective, for behind them was a king seizing every ship usurpingly.
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: وَأَمَّا الْغُلَامُ فَكَانَ أَبَوَاهُ مُؤْمِنَيْنِ فَخَشِينَا أَن يُرْهِقَهُمَا طُغْيَانًا وَكُفْرًا
english translation text:
As for the boy, his parents were faithful [persons], and We feared he would overwhelm them with rebellion and unfaith.
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: فَأَرَدْنَا أَن يُبْدِلَهُمَا رَبُّهُمَا خَيْرًا مِّنْهُ زَكَاةً وَأَقْرَبَ رُحْمًا
english translation text:
So We desired that their Lord should give them in exchange one better than him in respect of purity and closer in mercy.
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: وَأَمَّا الْجِدَارُ فَكَانَ لِغُلَامَيْنِ يَتِيمَيْنِ فِي الْمَدِينَةِ وَكَانَ تَحْتَهُ كَنزٌ لَّهُمَا وَكَانَ أَبُوهُمَا صَالِحًا
english translation text:
As for the wall, it belonged to two boy orphans in the city. Under it there was a treasure belonging to them. Their father had been a righteous man
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: فَأَرَادَ رَبُّكَ أَن يَبْلُغَا أَشُدَّهُمَا وَيَسْتَخْرِجَا كَنزَهُمَا رَحْمَةً مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ وَمَا فَعَلْتُهُ عَنْ أَمْرِي ۚ ذَٰلِكَ تَأْوِيلُ مَا لَمْ تَسْطِع عَّلَيْهِ صَبْرًا
english translation text:
So your Lord desired that they should come of age and take out their treasure—as a mercy from your Lord. I did not do that out of my own accord. This is the interpretation of that over which you could not maintain patience.’
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: وَيَسْأَلُونَكَ عَن ذِي الْقَرْنَيْنِ ۖ قُلْ سَأَتْلُو عَلَيْكُم مِّنْهُ ذِكْرًا
english translation text:
They question you concerning Dhul Qarnayn. Say, ‘I will relate to you an account of him.’
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: إِنَّا مَكَّنَّا لَهُ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَآتَيْنَاهُ مِن كُلِّ شَيْءٍ سَبَبًا
english translation text:
Indeed We had granted him power in the land and given him the means to all things.
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: فَأَتْبَعَ سَبَبًا
english translation text:
So he directed a means.
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا بَلَغَ مَغْرِبَ الشَّمْسِ وَجَدَهَا تَغْرُبُ فِي عَيْنٍ حَمِئَةٍ وَوَجَدَ عِندَهَا قَوْمًا ۗ قُلْنَا يَا ذَا الْقَرْنَيْنِ إِمَّا أَن تُعَذِّبَ وَإِمَّا أَن تَتَّخِذَ فِيهِمْ حُسْنًا
english translation text:
When he reached the place where the sun sets, he found it setting over a warm sea, and by it he found a people. We said, ‘O Dhul Qarnayn! You will either punish them, or treat them with kindness.’
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: قَالَ أَمَّا مَن ظَلَمَ فَسَوْفَ نُعَذِّبُهُ ثُمَّ يُرَدُّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِ فَيُعَذِّبُهُ عَذَابًا نُّكْرًا
english translation text:
He said, ‘As for him who is a wrongdoer, we will punish him. Then he shall be returned to his Lord and He will punish him with a dire punishment.
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: وَأَمَّا مَنْ آمَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَالِحًا فَلَهُ جَزَاءً الْحُسْنَىٰ ۖ وَسَنَقُولُ لَهُ مِنْ أَمْرِنَا يُسْرًا
english translation text:
But as for him who has faith and acts righteously, he shall have the best reward, and we will assign him easy tasks under our command.’
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: ثُمَّ أَتْبَعَ سَبَبًا
english translation text:
Thereafter he directed another means.
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا بَلَغَ مَطْلِعَ الشَّمْسِ وَجَدَهَا تَطْلُعُ عَلَىٰ قَوْمٍ لَّمْ نَجْعَل لَّهُم مِّن دُونِهَا سِتْرًا
english translation text:
When he reached the place where the sun rises, he found it rising on a people for whom We had not provided any shield against it.
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: كَذَٰلِكَ وَقَدْ أَحَطْنَا بِمَا لَدَيْهِ خُبْرًا
english translation text:
So it was, and We were fully aware of whatever [means] he possessed.
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: ثُمَّ أَتْبَعَ سَبَبًا
english translation text:
Thereafter he directed another means.
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا بَلَغَ بَيْنَ السَّدَّيْنِ وَجَدَ مِن دُونِهِمَا قَوْمًا لَّا يَكَادُونَ يَفْقَهُونَ قَوْلًا
english translation text:
When he reached [the place] between the two barriers, he found between them a people who could hardly understand a word [of his language].
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: قَالُوا يَا ذَا الْقَرْنَيْنِ إِنَّ يَأْجُوجَ وَمَأْجُوجَ مُفْسِدُونَ فِي الْأَرْضِ فَهَلْ نَجْعَلُ لَكَ خَرْجًا عَلَىٰ أَن تَجْعَلَ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَهُمْ سَدًّا
english translation text:
They said, ‘O Dhul Qarnayn! Indeed Gog and Magog are causing disaster in this land. Shall we pay you a tribute on condition that you build a barrier between them and us?’
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: قَالَ مَا مَكَّنِّي فِيهِ رَبِّي خَيْرٌ فَأَعِينُونِي بِقُوَّةٍ أَجْعَلْ بَيْنَكُمْ وَبَيْنَهُمْ رَدْمًا
english translation text:
He said, ‘What my Lord has furnished me is better. Yet help me with some strength, and I will make a bulwark between you and them.
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: آتُونِي زُبَرَ الْحَدِيدِ ۖ حَتَّىٰ إِذَا سَاوَىٰ بَيْنَ الصَّدَفَيْنِ قَالَ انفُخُوا ۖ حَتَّىٰ إِذَا جَعَلَهُ نَارًا قَالَ آتُونِي أُفْرِغْ عَلَيْهِ قِطْرًا
english translation text:
Bring me pieces of iron!’ When he had levelled up between the flanks, he said, ‘Blow!’ When he had turned it into fire, he said, ‘Bring me molten copper to pour over it.’
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: فَمَا اسْطَاعُوا أَن يَظْهَرُوهُ وَمَا اسْتَطَاعُوا لَهُ نَقْبًا
english translation text:
So they could neither scale it, nor could they make a hole in it.
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: قَالَ هَٰذَا رَحْمَةٌ مِّن رَّبِّي ۖ فَإِذَا جَاءَ وَعْدُ رَبِّي جَعَلَهُ دَكَّاءَ ۖ وَكَانَ وَعْدُ رَبِّي حَقًّا
english translation text:
He said, ‘This is a mercy from my Lord. But when the promise of my Lord is fulfilled, He will level it; and my Lord’s promise is true.’
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: وَتَرَكْنَا بَعْضَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَمُوجُ فِي بَعْضٍ ۖ وَنُفِخَ فِي الصُّورِ فَجَمَعْنَاهُمْ جَمْعًا
english translation text:
That day We shall let them surge over one another, the Trumpet will be blown, and We shall gather them all,
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: وَعَرَضْنَا جَهَنَّمَ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْكَافِرِينَ عَرْضًا
english translation text:
and on that day We shall bring hell into view visibly for the faithless.
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: الَّذِينَ كَانَتْ أَعْيُنُهُمْ فِي غِطَاءٍ عَن ذِكْرِي وَكَانُوا لَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ سَمْعًا
english translation text:
—Those whose eyes were blind to My remembrance and who could not hear.
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: أَفَحَسِبَ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا أَن يَتَّخِذُوا عِبَادِي مِن دُونِي أَوْلِيَاءَ ۚ إِنَّا أَعْتَدْنَا جَهَنَّمَ لِلْكَافِرِينَ نُزُلًا
english translation text:
Do the faithless suppose that they have taken My servants for guardians in My stead? Indeed, We have prepared hell for the hospitality of the faithless.
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: قُلْ هَلْ نُنَبِّئُكُم بِالْأَخْسَرِينَ أَعْمَالًا
english translation text:
Say, ‘Shall we inform you who are the biggest losers in their works?
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: الَّذِينَ ضَلَّ سَعْيُهُمْ فِي الْحَيَاةِ الدُّنْيَا وَهُمْ يَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّهُمْ يُحْسِنُونَ صُنْعًا
english translation text:
Those whose efforts are misguided in the life of the world, while they suppose they are doing good.’
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: أُولَٰئِكَ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا بِآيَاتِ رَبِّهِمْ وَلِقَائِهِ فَحَبِطَتْ أَعْمَالُهُمْ فَلَا نُقِيمُ لَهُمْ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ وَزْنًا
english translation text:
They are the ones who deny the signs of their Lord and encounter with Him. So their works have failed. On the Day of Resurrection We will not give them any weight.
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: ذَٰلِكَ جَزَاؤُهُمْ جَهَنَّمُ بِمَا كَفَرُوا وَاتَّخَذُوا آيَاتِي وَرُسُلِي هُزُوًا
english translation text:
That is their requital—hell—because of their unfaith and for deriding My signs and apostles.
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوا الصَّالِحَاتِ كَانَتْ لَهُمْ جَنَّاتُ الْفِرْدَوْسِ نُزُلًا
english translation text:
As for those who have faith and do righteous deeds, they shall have the gardens of Firdaws for abode,
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: خَالِدِينَ فِيهَا لَا يَبْغُونَ عَنْهَا حِوَلًا
english translation text:
to remain in them [forever]; they will not seek to leave it for another place.
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: قُل لَّوْ كَانَ الْبَحْرُ مِدَادًا لِّكَلِمَاتِ رَبِّي لَنَفِدَ الْبَحْرُ قَبْلَ أَن تَنفَدَ كَلِمَاتُ رَبِّي وَلَوْ جِئْنَا بِمِثْلِهِ مَدَدًا
english translation text:
Say, ‘If the sea were ink for the words of my Lord, the sea would be spent before the words of my Lord are finished, though We replenish it with another like it.’
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: قُلْ إِنَّمَا أَنَا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُكُمْ يُوحَىٰ إِلَيَّ أَنَّمَا إِلَٰهُكُمْ إِلَٰهٌ وَاحِدٌ ۖ فَمَن كَانَ يَرْجُو لِقَاءَ رَبِّهِ فَلْيَعْمَلْ عَمَلًا صَالِحًا وَلَا يُشْرِكْ بِعِبَادَةِ رَبِّهِ أَحَدًا
english translation text:
Say, ‘I am just a human being like you. It has been revealed to me that your God is the One God. So whoever expects to encounter his Lord—let him act righteously, and not associate anyone with the worship of his Lord.’
Al Khaf – The Cave

arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: كهيعص
english translation text:
Kaf, Ha, Ya, ‘Ayn, Suad.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: ذِكْرُ رَحْمَتِ رَبِّكَ عَبْدَهُ زَكَرِيَّا
english translation text:
[This is] an account of your Lord’s mercy on His servant, Zechariah,
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُ نِدَاءً خَفِيًّا
english translation text:
when he called out to his Lord with a secret cry.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّي وَهَنَ الْعَظْمُ مِنِّي وَاشْتَعَلَ الرَّأْسُ شَيْبًا وَلَمْ أَكُن بِدُعَائِكَ رَبِّ شَقِيًّا
english translation text:
He said, ‘My Lord! Indeed my bones have become feeble, and my head has turned white with age, yet never have I, my Lord, been disappointed in supplicating You!
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَإِنِّي خِفْتُ الْمَوَالِيَ مِن وَرَائِي وَكَانَتِ امْرَأَتِي عَاقِرًا فَهَبْ لِي مِن لَّدُنكَ وَلِيًّا
english translation text:
Indeed I fear my kinsmen, after me, and my wife is barren. So grant me from Yourself an heir
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: يَرِثُنِي وَيَرِثُ مِنْ آلِ يَعْقُوبَ ۖ وَاجْعَلْهُ رَبِّ رَضِيًّا
english translation text:
who may inherit from me and inherit from the House of Jacob, and make him, my Lord, pleasing [to You]!’
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: يَا زَكَرِيَّا إِنَّا نُبَشِّرُكَ بِغُلَامٍ اسْمُهُ يَحْيَىٰ لَمْ نَجْعَل لَّهُ مِن قَبْلُ سَمِيًّا
english translation text:
‘O Zechariah! Indeed We give you the good news of a son, whose name is ‘‘John.’’ Never before have We made anyone his namesake.’
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: قَالَ رَبِّ أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لِي غُلَامٌ وَكَانَتِ امْرَأَتِي عَاقِرًا وَقَدْ بَلَغْتُ مِنَ الْكِبَرِ عِتِيًّا
english translation text:
He said, ‘My Lord! How shall I have a son, when my wife is barren, and I am already advanced in age?’
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: قَالَ كَذَٰلِكَ قَالَ رَبُّكَ هُوَ عَلَيَّ هَيِّنٌ وَقَدْ خَلَقْتُكَ مِن قَبْلُ وَلَمْ تَكُ شَيْئًا
english translation text:
He said, ‘So shall it be. Your Lord has said, ‘‘It is simple for Me.’’ Certainly I created you before when you were nothing.’
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: قَالَ رَبِّ اجْعَل لِّي آيَةً ۚ قَالَ آيَتُكَ أَلَّا تُكَلِّمَ النَّاسَ ثَلَاثَ لَيَالٍ سَوِيًّا
english translation text:
He said, ‘My Lord! Appoint a sign for me.’ He said, ‘Your sign is that you will not speak to the people for three complete nights.’
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: فَخَرَجَ عَلَىٰ قَوْمِهِ مِنَ الْمِحْرَابِ فَأَوْحَىٰ إِلَيْهِمْ أَن سَبِّحُوا بُكْرَةً وَعَشِيًّا
english translation text:
So he emerged before his people from the Temple, and signalled to them that they should glorify [Allah] morning and evening.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: يَا يَحْيَىٰ خُذِ الْكِتَابَ بِقُوَّةٍ ۖ وَآتَيْنَاهُ الْحُكْمَ صَبِيًّا
english translation text:
‘O John!’ [We said,] ‘Hold on with power to the Book!’ And We gave him judgement while still a child,
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَحَنَانًا مِّن لَّدُنَّا وَزَكَاةً ۖ وَكَانَ تَقِيًّا
english translation text:
and a compassion and purity from Us. He was Godwary
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَبَرًّا بِوَالِدَيْهِ وَلَمْ يَكُن جَبَّارًا عَصِيًّا
english translation text:
and good to his parents, and was not self-willed or disobedient.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَسَلَامٌ عَلَيْهِ يَوْمَ وُلِدَ وَيَوْمَ يَمُوتُ وَيَوْمَ يُبْعَثُ حَيًّا
english translation text:
Peace be to him, the day he was born, and the day he dies, and the day he is raised alive!
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَاذْكُرْ فِي الْكِتَابِ مَرْيَمَ إِذِ انتَبَذَتْ مِنْ أَهْلِهَا مَكَانًا شَرْقِيًّا
english translation text:
And mention in the Book Mary, when she withdrew from her family to an easterly place.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: فَاتَّخَذَتْ مِن دُونِهِمْ حِجَابًا فَأَرْسَلْنَا إِلَيْهَا رُوحَنَا فَتَمَثَّلَ لَهَا بَشَرًا سَوِيًّا
english translation text:
Thus did she seclude herself from them, whereupon We sent to her Our Spirit and he became incarnate for her as a well-proportioned human.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: قَالَتْ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِالرَّحْمَٰنِ مِنكَ إِن كُنتَ تَقِيًّا
english translation text:
She said, ‘I seek the protection of the All-beneficent from you, should you be Godwary!’
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: قَالَ إِنَّمَا أَنَا رَسُولُ رَبِّكِ لِأَهَبَ لَكِ غُلَامًا زَكِيًّا
english translation text:
He said, ‘I am only a messenger of your Lord that I may give you a pure son.’
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: قَالَتْ أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لِي غُلَامٌ وَلَمْ يَمْسَسْنِي بَشَرٌ وَلَمْ أَكُ بَغِيًّا
english translation text:
She said, ‘How shall I have a child seeing that no human being has ever touched me, nor have I been unchaste?’
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: قَالَ كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ هُوَ عَلَيَّ هَيِّنٌ ۖ وَلِنَجْعَلَهُ آيَةً لِّلنَّاسِ وَرَحْمَةً مِّنَّا ۚ وَكَانَ أَمْرًا مَّقْضِيًّا
english translation text:
He said, ‘So shall it be. Your Lord says, ‘‘It is simple for Me.’’ And so that We may make him a sign for mankind and a mercy from Us, and it is a matter [already] decided.’
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: فَحَمَلَتْهُ فَانتَبَذَتْ بِهِ مَكَانًا قَصِيًّا
english translation text:
Thus she conceived him, then withdrew with him to a distant place.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: فَأَجَاءَهَا الْمَخَاضُ إِلَىٰ جِذْعِ النَّخْلَةِ قَالَتْ يَا لَيْتَنِي مِتُّ قَبْلَ هَٰذَا وَكُنتُ نَسْيًا مَّنسِيًّا
english translation text:
The birth pangs brought her to the trunk of a date palm. She said, ‘I wish I had died before this and become a forgotten thing, beyond recall.’
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: فَنَادَاهَا مِن تَحْتِهَا أَلَّا تَحْزَنِي قَدْ جَعَلَ رَبُّكِ تَحْتَكِ سَرِيًّا
english translation text:
Thereupon he called her from below her [saying,] ‘Do not grieve! Your Lord has made a spring to flow at your feet.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَهُزِّي إِلَيْكِ بِجِذْعِ النَّخْلَةِ تُسَاقِطْ عَلَيْكِ رُطَبًا جَنِيًّا
english translation text:
Shake the trunk of the palm tree, freshly picked dates will drop upon you.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: فَكُلِي وَاشْرَبِي وَقَرِّي عَيْنًا ۖ فَإِمَّا تَرَيِنَّ مِنَ الْبَشَرِ أَحَدًا فَقُولِي إِنِّي نَذَرْتُ لِلرَّحْمَٰنِ صَوْمًا فَلَنْ أُكَلِّمَ الْيَوْمَ إِنسِيًّا
english translation text:
Eat, drink, and be comforted. Then if you see any human, say, ‘‘Indeed I have vowed a fast to the All-beneficent, so I will not speak to any human today.’’ ’
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: فَأَتَتْ بِهِ قَوْمَهَا تَحْمِلُهُ ۖ قَالُوا يَا مَرْيَمُ لَقَدْ جِئْتِ شَيْئًا فَرِيًّا
english translation text:
Then carrying him she brought him to her people. They said, ‘O Mary, you have certainly come up with an odd thing!
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: يَا أُخْتَ هَارُونَ مَا كَانَ أَبُوكِ امْرَأَ سَوْءٍ وَمَا كَانَتْ أُمُّكِ بَغِيًّا
english translation text:
O sister of Aaron[’s lineage]! Your father was not an evil man, nor was your mother unchaste.’
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: فَأَشَارَتْ إِلَيْهِ ۖ قَالُوا كَيْفَ نُكَلِّمُ مَن كَانَ فِي الْمَهْدِ صَبِيًّا
english translation text:
Thereat she pointed to him. They said, ‘How can we speak to one who is yet a baby in the cradle?’
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: قَالَ إِنِّي عَبْدُ اللَّهِ آتَانِيَ الْكِتَابَ وَجَعَلَنِي نَبِيًّا
english translation text:
He said, ‘Indeed I am a servant of Allah! He has given me the Book and made me a prophet.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَجَعَلَنِي مُبَارَكًا أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُ وَأَوْصَانِي بِالصَّلَاةِ وَالزَّكَاةِ مَا دُمْتُ حَيًّا
english translation text:
He has made me blessed, wherever I may be, and He has enjoined me to [maintain] the prayer and to [pay] the zakat as long as I live,
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَبَرًّا بِوَالِدَتِي وَلَمْ يَجْعَلْنِي جَبَّارًا شَقِيًّا
english translation text:
and to be good to my mother, and He has not made me self-willed and wretched.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَالسَّلَامُ عَلَيَّ يَوْمَ وُلِدتُّ وَيَوْمَ أَمُوتُ وَيَوْمَ أُبْعَثُ حَيًّا
english translation text:
Peace to me the day I was born, and the day I die, and the day I am raised alive.’
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: ذَٰلِكَ عِيسَى ابْنُ مَرْيَمَ ۚ قَوْلَ الْحَقِّ الَّذِي فِيهِ يَمْتَرُونَ
english translation text:
That is Jesus, son of Mary, a Word of the Real concerning whom they are in doubt.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: مَا كَانَ لِلَّهِ أَن يَتَّخِذَ مِن وَلَدٍ ۖ سُبْحَانَهُ ۚ إِذَا قَضَىٰ أَمْرًا فَإِنَّمَا يَقُولُ لَهُ كُن فَيَكُونُ
english translation text:
It is not for Allah to take a son. Immaculate is He! When He decides on a matter, He just says to it, ‘Be!’ and it is.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَإِنَّ اللَّهَ رَبِّي وَرَبُّكُمْ فَاعْبُدُوهُ ۚ هَٰذَا صِرَاطٌ مُّسْتَقِيمٌ
english translation text:
[And Jesus said,] ‘Indeed Allah is my Lord and your Lord. So worship Him. This is a straight path.’
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: فَاخْتَلَفَ الْأَحْزَابُ مِن بَيْنِهِمْ ۖ فَوَيْلٌ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا مِن مَّشْهَدِ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
english translation text:
But the factions differed among themselves. So woe to the faithless at the scene of a tremendous day.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: أَسْمِعْ بِهِمْ وَأَبْصِرْ يَوْمَ يَأْتُونَنَا ۖ لَٰكِنِ الظَّالِمُونَ الْيَوْمَ فِي ضَلَالٍ مُّبِينٍ
english translation text:
How well they will hear and how well they will see on the day when they come to Us! But today the wrongdoers are in manifest error.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَأَنذِرْهُمْ يَوْمَ الْحَسْرَةِ إِذْ قُضِيَ الْأَمْرُ وَهُمْ فِي غَفْلَةٍ وَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
english translation text:
Warn them of the Day of Regret, when the matter will be decided, while they are [yet] heedless and do not have faith.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَرِثُ الْأَرْضَ وَمَنْ عَلَيْهَا وَإِلَيْنَا يُرْجَعُونَ
english translation text:
Indeed We shall inherit the earth and whoever there is on it, and to Us they shall be brought back.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَاذْكُرْ فِي الْكِتَابِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ ۚ إِنَّهُ كَانَ صِدِّيقًا نَّبِيًّا
english translation text:
And mention in the Book Abraham. Indeed, he was a truthful man and a prophet.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ يَا أَبَتِ لِمَ تَعْبُدُ مَا لَا يَسْمَعُ وَلَا يُبْصِرُ وَلَا يُغْنِي عَنكَ شَيْئًا
english translation text:
When he said to his father, ‘Father! Why do you worship that which neither hears nor sees, and is of no avail to you in any way?
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: يَا أَبَتِ إِنِّي قَدْ جَاءَنِي مِنَ الْعِلْمِ مَا لَمْ يَأْتِكَ فَاتَّبِعْنِي أَهْدِكَ صِرَاطًا سَوِيًّا
english translation text:
Father! Indeed a knowledge has already come to me, which has not come to you. So follow me that I may guide you to a right path.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: يَا أَبَتِ لَا تَعْبُدِ الشَّيْطَانَ ۖ إِنَّ الشَّيْطَانَ كَانَ لِلرَّحْمَٰنِ عَصِيًّا
english translation text:
Father! Do not worship Satan. Indeed Satan is disobedient to the All-beneficent.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: يَا أَبَتِ إِنِّي أَخَافُ أَن يَمَسَّكَ عَذَابٌ مِّنَ الرَّحْمَٰنِ فَتَكُونَ لِلشَّيْطَانِ وَلِيًّا
english translation text:
Father! I am indeed afraid that a punishment from the All-beneficent will befall you, and you will become Satan’s accomplice.’
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: قَالَ أَرَاغِبٌ أَنتَ عَنْ آلِهَتِي يَا إِبْرَاهِيمُ ۖ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ لَأَرْجُمَنَّكَ ۖ وَاهْجُرْنِي مَلِيًّا
english translation text:
He said, ‘Abraham! Are you renouncing my gods? If you do not desist, I will stone you. Get away from me for a long while.’
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: قَالَ سَلَامٌ عَلَيْكَ ۖ سَأَسْتَغْفِرُ لَكَ رَبِّي ۖ إِنَّهُ كَانَ بِي حَفِيًّا
english translation text:
He said, ‘Peace be to you! I shall plead with my Lord to forgive you. Indeed, He is gracious to me.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَأَعْتَزِلُكُمْ وَمَا تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ اللَّهِ وَأَدْعُو رَبِّي عَسَىٰ أَلَّا أَكُونَ بِدُعَاءِ رَبِّي شَقِيًّا
english translation text:
I dissociate myself from you and whatever you invoke besides Allah. I will supplicate my Lord. Hopefully, I will not be disappointed in supplicating my Lord.’
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: فَلَمَّا اعْتَزَلَهُمْ وَمَا يَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ اللَّهِ وَهَبْنَا لَهُ إِسْحَاقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ ۖ وَكُلًّا جَعَلْنَا نَبِيًّا
english translation text:
So when he had left them and what they worshipped besides Allah, We gave him Isaac and Jacob, and each We made a prophet.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُم مِّن رَّحْمَتِنَا وَجَعَلْنَا لَهُمْ لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ عَلِيًّا
english translation text:
And We gave them out of Our mercy, and conferred on them a worthy and lofty repute.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَاذْكُرْ فِي الْكِتَابِ مُوسَىٰ ۚ إِنَّهُ كَانَ مُخْلَصًا وَكَانَ رَسُولًا نَّبِيًّا
english translation text:
And mention in the Book Moses. Indeed he was exclusively dedicated [to Allah], and an apostle and prophet.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَنَادَيْنَاهُ مِن جَانِبِ الطُّورِ الْأَيْمَنِ وَقَرَّبْنَاهُ نَجِيًّا
english translation text:
We called him from the right side of the Mount and We drew him near [to Ourselves] for confidential discourse.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُ مِن رَّحْمَتِنَا أَخَاهُ هَارُونَ نَبِيًّا
english translation text:
And We gave him out of Our mercy his brother Aaron, a prophet.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَاذْكُرْ فِي الْكِتَابِ إِسْمَاعِيلَ ۚ إِنَّهُ كَانَ صَادِقَ الْوَعْدِ وَكَانَ رَسُولًا نَّبِيًّا
english translation text:
And mention in the Book Ishmael. Indeed, he was true to his promise, and an apostle and prophet.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَكَانَ يَأْمُرُ أَهْلَهُ بِالصَّلَاةِ وَالزَّكَاةِ وَكَانَ عِندَ رَبِّهِ مَرْضِيًّا
english translation text:
He used to bid his family to [maintain] the prayer and to [pay] the zakat, and was pleasing to his Lord.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَاذْكُرْ فِي الْكِتَابِ إِدْرِيسَ ۚ إِنَّهُ كَانَ صِدِّيقًا نَّبِيًّا
english translation text:
And mention in the Book Idrees. Indeed, he was a truthful one and a prophet,
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَرَفَعْنَاهُ مَكَانًا عَلِيًّا
english translation text:
and We raised him to an exalted station.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: أُولَٰئِكَ الَّذِينَ أَنْعَمَ اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ النَّبِيِّينَ مِن ذُرِّيَّةِ آدَمَ وَمِمَّنْ حَمَلْنَا مَعَ نُوحٍ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّةِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَإِسْرَائِيلَ وَمِمَّنْ هَدَيْنَا وَاجْتَبَيْنَا ۚ
english translation text:
They are the ones whom Allah has blessed from among the prophets of Adam’s progeny, and from [the progeny of] those We carried with Noah, and from among the progeny of Abraham and Israel, and from among those that We guided and chose.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ آيَاتُ الرَّحْمَٰنِ خَرُّوا سُجَّدًا وَبُكِيًّا ۩
english translation text:
When the signs of the All-beneficent were recited to them, they would fall down weeping in prostration.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: فَخَلَفَ مِن بَعْدِهِمْ خَلْفٌ أَضَاعُوا الصَّلَاةَ وَاتَّبَعُوا الشَّهَوَاتِ ۖ فَسَوْفَ يَلْقَوْنَ غَيًّا
english translation text:
But they were succeeded by an evil posterity who neglected the prayer, and followed [their base] appetites. So they will soon encounter [the reward of] perversity,
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: إِلَّا مَن تَابَ وَآمَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَالِحًا فَأُولَٰئِكَ يَدْخُلُونَ الْجَنَّةَ وَلَا يُظْلَمُونَ شَيْئًا
english translation text:
barring those who repent, believe, and act righteously. Such will enter paradise, and they will not be wronged in the least.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: جَنَّاتِ عَدْنٍ الَّتِي وَعَدَ الرَّحْمَٰنُ عِبَادَهُ بِالْغَيْبِ ۚ إِنَّهُ كَانَ وَعْدُهُ مَأْتِيًّا
english translation text:
Gardens of Eden promised by the All-beneficent to His servants, [while they were still] unseen. Indeed His promise is bound to come to pass.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا إِلَّا سَلَامًا ۖ وَلَهُمْ رِزْقُهُمْ فِيهَا بُكْرَةً وَعَشِيًّا
english translation text:
Therein they will not hear vain talk, but only ‘Peace!’ Therein they will have their provision morning and evening.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: تِلْكَ الْجَنَّةُ الَّتِي نُورِثُ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا مَن كَانَ تَقِيًّا
english translation text:
This is the paradise We will give as inheritance to those of Our servants who are Godwary.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَمَا نَتَنَزَّلُ إِلَّا بِأَمْرِ رَبِّكَ ۖ لَهُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِينَا وَمَا خَلْفَنَا وَمَا بَيْنَ ذَٰلِكَ ۚ وَمَا كَانَ رَبُّكَ نَسِيًّا
english translation text:
[O Gabriel, tell the Prophet,] ‘We do not descend except by the command of your Lord. To Him belongs whatever is before us and whatever is behind us and whatever is in between that, and your Lord does not forget
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: رَّبُّ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فَاعْبُدْهُ وَاصْطَبِرْ لِعِبَادَتِهِ ۚ هَلْ تَعْلَمُ لَهُ سَمِيًّا
english translation text:
—the Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them. So worship Him and be steadfast in His worship. Do you know anyone who could be His namesake?’
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَيَقُولُ الْإِنسَانُ أَإِذَا مَا مِتُّ لَسَوْفَ أُخْرَجُ حَيًّا
english translation text:
Man says, ‘What? Shall I be brought forth alive [from the grave], when I have been dead?’
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: أَوَلَا يَذْكُرُ الْإِنسَانُ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَاهُ مِن قَبْلُ وَلَمْ يَكُ شَيْئًا
english translation text:
Does not man remember that We created him before when he was nothing?
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَحْشُرَنَّهُمْ وَالشَّيَاطِينَ ثُمَّ لَنُحْضِرَنَّهُمْ حَوْلَ جَهَنَّمَ جِثِيًّا
english translation text:
By your Lord, We will surely gather them with the devils; then We will surely bring them up around hell [scrambling] on their knees.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: ثُمَّ لَنَنزِعَنَّ مِن كُلِّ شِيعَةٍ أَيُّهُمْ أَشَدُّ عَلَى الرَّحْمَٰنِ عِتِيًّا
english translation text:
Then from every group We shall draw whichever of them was more defiant towards the All-beneficent.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: ثُمَّ لَنَحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِالَّذِينَ هُمْ أَوْلَىٰ بِهَا صِلِيًّا
english translation text:
Then surely We will know best those who deserve most to enter it.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَإِن مِّنكُمْ إِلَّا وَارِدُهَا ۚ كَانَ عَلَىٰ رَبِّكَ حَتْمًا مَّقْضِيًّا
english translation text:
There is none of you but will come to it: a [matter that is a] decided certainty with your Lord.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: ثُمَّ نُنَجِّي الَّذِينَ اتَّقَوا وَّنَذَرُ الظَّالِمِينَ فِيهَا جِثِيًّا
english translation text:
Then We will deliver those who are Godwary, and leave the wrongdoers in it, fallen on their knees.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَإِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ آيَاتُنَا بَيِّنَاتٍ قَالَ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا لِلَّذِينَ آمَنُوا أَيُّ الْفَرِيقَيْنِ خَيْرٌ مَّقَامًا وَأَحْسَنُ نَدِيًّا
english translation text:
When Our manifest signs are recited to them, the faithless say to the faithful, ‘Which of the two groups is superior in station and better with respect to company?’
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هُمْ أَحْسَنُ أَثَاثًا وَرِئْيًا
english translation text:
How many a generation We have destroyed before them, who were superior in furnishings and appearance!
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: قُلْ مَن كَانَ فِي الضَّلَالَةِ فَلْيَمْدُدْ لَهُ الرَّحْمَٰنُ مَدًّا ۚ
english translation text:
Say, ‘Whoever abides in error,
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: حَتَّىٰ إِذَا رَأَوْا مَا يُوعَدُونَ إِمَّا الْعَذَابَ وَإِمَّا السَّاعَةَ فَسَيَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ هُوَ شَرٌّ مَّكَانًا وَأَضْعَفُ جُندًا
english translation text:
the All-beneficent shall prolong his respite until they sight what they have been promised: either punishment, or the Hour.’ Then they will know whose position is worse, and whose host is weaker.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَيَزِيدُ اللَّهُ الَّذِينَ اهْتَدَوْا هُدًى ۗ وَالْبَاقِيَاتُ الصَّالِحَاتُ خَيْرٌ عِندَ رَبِّكَ ثَوَابًا وَخَيْرٌ مَّرَدًّا
english translation text:
Allah enhances in guidance those who are [rightly] guided, and lasting righteous deeds are better with your Lord in reward, and better at the return [to Allah].
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: أَفَرَأَيْتَ الَّذِي كَفَرَ بِآيَاتِنَا وَقَالَ لَأُوتَيَنَّ مَالًا وَوَلَدًا
english translation text:
Have you not regarded him who defies Our signs, and says, ‘I will surely be given wealth and children’?
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: أَطَّلَعَ الْغَيْبَ أَمِ اتَّخَذَ عِندَ الرَّحْمَٰنِ عَهْدًا
english translation text:
Has he come to know the Unseen, or taken a promise from the All-beneficent?
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: كَلَّا ۚ سَنَكْتُبُ مَا يَقُولُ وَنَمُدُّ لَهُ مِنَ الْعَذَابِ مَدًّا
english translation text:
No indeed! We will write down what he says, and We will prolong his punishment endlessly.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَنَرِثُهُ مَا يَقُولُ وَيَأْتِينَا فَرْدًا
english translation text:
We shall take over from him what he talks about, and he will come to Us alone.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَاتَّخَذُوا مِن دُونِ اللَّهِ آلِهَةً لِّيَكُونُوا لَهُمْ عِزًّا
english translation text:
They have taken gods besides Allah that they may be a [source of] might to them.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: كَلَّا ۚ سَيَكْفُرُونَ بِعِبَادَتِهِمْ وَيَكُونُونَ عَلَيْهِمْ ضِدًّا
english translation text:
No Indeed! Soon they will disown their worship, and they will be their opponents.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّا أَرْسَلْنَا الشَّيَاطِينَ عَلَى الْكَافِرِينَ تَؤُزُّهُمْ أَزًّا
english translation text:
Have you not regarded that We unleash the devils upon the faithless to urge them vigorously?
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: فَلَا تَعْجَلْ عَلَيْهِمْ ۖ إِنَّمَا نَعُدُّ لَهُمْ عَدًّا
english translation text:
So do not make haste against them; indeed We are counting for them, a counting [down].
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: يَوْمَ نَحْشُرُ الْمُتَّقِينَ إِلَى الرَّحْمَٰنِ وَفْدًا
english translation text:
The day We shall gather the Godwary toward the All-beneficent, on mounts,
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَنَسُوقُ الْمُجْرِمِينَ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ وِرْدًا
english translation text:
and drive the guilty as a thirsty herd towards hell,
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: لَّا يَمْلِكُونَ الشَّفَاعَةَ إِلَّا مَنِ اتَّخَذَ عِندَ الرَّحْمَٰنِ عَهْدًا
english translation text:
no one will have the power to intercede [with Allah], except for him who has taken a covenant with the All-beneficent.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَقَالُوا اتَّخَذَ الرَّحْمَٰنُ وَلَدًا
english translation text:
They say, ‘The All-beneficent has taken a son!’
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: لَّقَدْ جِئْتُمْ شَيْئًا إِدًّا
english translation text:
You have certainly advanced something hideous!
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: تَكَادُ السَّمَاوَاتُ يَتَفَطَّرْنَ مِنْهُ وَتَنشَقُّ الْأَرْضُ وَتَخِرُّ الْجِبَالُ هَدًّا
english translation text:
The heavens are about to be rent apart at it, the earth to split open, and the mountains to collapse into bits,
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: أَن دَعَوْا لِلرَّحْمَٰنِ وَلَدًا
english translation text:
that they should ascribe a son to the All-beneficent!
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَمَا يَنبَغِي لِلرَّحْمَٰنِ أَن يَتَّخِذَ وَلَدًا
english translation text:
It does not behoove the All-beneficent to take a son.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: إِن كُلُّ مَن فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ إِلَّا آتِي الرَّحْمَٰنِ عَبْدًا
english translation text:
There is none in the heavens and the earth but he comes to the All-beneficent as a servant.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: لَّقَدْ أَحْصَاهُمْ وَعَدَّهُمْ عَدًّا
english translation text:
Certainly He has counted them [all] and numbered them precisely,
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَكُلُّهُمْ آتِيهِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ فَرْدًا
english translation text:
and each of them will come to Him alone on the Day of Resurrection.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَمِلُوا الصَّالِحَاتِ سَيَجْعَلُ لَهُمُ الرَّحْمَٰنُ وُدًّا
english translation text:
Indeed those who have faith and do righteous deeds—the All-beneficent will endear them [to His creation].
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرْنَاهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لِتُبَشِّرَ بِهِ الْمُتَّقِينَ وَتُنذِرَ بِهِ قَوْمًا لُّدًّا
english translation text:
Indeed We have made it simple in your language so that you may give good news thereby to the Godwary and warn with it a disputatious lot.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هَلْ تُحِسُّ مِنْهُم مِّنْ أَحَدٍ أَوْ تَسْمَعُ لَهُمْ رِكْزًا
english translation text:
How many a generation We have destroyed before them! Can you descry any one of them, or hear from them so much as a murmur?
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Maryam – Mary

arabic text: طه
english translation text:
Ta Ha!
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: مَا أَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْكَ الْقُرْآنَ لِتَشْقَىٰ
english translation text:
We did not send down to you the Quran that you should be miserable,
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِلَّا تَذْكِرَةً لِّمَن يَخْشَىٰ
english translation text:
but only as an admonition to him who fears [his Lord].
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: تَنزِيلًا مِّمَّنْ خَلَقَ الْأَرْضَ وَالسَّمَاوَاتِ الْعُلَى
english translation text:
A sending down [of the Revelation] from Him who created the earth and the lofty heavens
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: الرَّحْمَٰنُ عَلَى الْعَرْشِ اسْتَوَىٰ
english translation text:
—the All-beneficent, settled on the Throne.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَمَا تَحْتَ الثَّرَىٰ
english translation text:
To Him belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth, and whatever is between them, and whatever is under the ground.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَإِن تَجْهَرْ بِالْقَوْلِ فَإِنَّهُ يَعْلَمُ السِّرَّ وَأَخْفَى
english translation text:
Whether you speak loudly [or in secret tones,] He indeed knows the secret and what is still more hidden.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ لَهُ الْأَسْمَاءُ الْحُسْنَىٰ
english translation text:
Allah—there is no god except Him—to Him belong the Best Names.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَهَلْ أَتَاكَ حَدِيثُ مُوسَىٰ
english translation text:
Did the story of Moses come to you,
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِذْ رَأَىٰ نَارًا فَقَالَ لِأَهْلِهِ امْكُثُوا إِنِّي آنَسْتُ نَارًا لَّعَلِّي آتِيكُم مِّنْهَا بِقَبَسٍ أَوْ أَجِدُ عَلَى النَّارِ هُدًى
english translation text:
when he sighted a fire, and said to his family, ‘Wait! Indeed, I descry a fire! Maybe I will bring you a brand from it, or find some guidance at the fire.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَلَمَّا أَتَاهَا نُودِيَ يَا مُوسَىٰ
english translation text:
So when he came to it, he was called, ‘O Moses!
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِنِّي أَنَا رَبُّكَ فَاخْلَعْ نَعْلَيْكَ ۖ إِنَّكَ بِالْوَادِ الْمُقَدَّسِ طُوًى
english translation text:
Indeed I am your Lord! So take off your sandals. You are indeed in the sacred valley of Tuwa.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَأَنَا اخْتَرْتُكَ فَاسْتَمِعْ لِمَا يُوحَىٰ
english translation text:
I have chosen you; so listen to what is revealed.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِنَّنِي أَنَا اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنَا فَاعْبُدْنِي وَأَقِمِ الصَّلَاةَ لِذِكْرِي
english translation text:
Indeed I am Allah—there is no god except Me. So worship Me, and maintain the prayer for My remembrance.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِنَّ السَّاعَةَ آتِيَةٌ أَكَادُ أُخْفِيهَا لِتُجْزَىٰ كُلُّ نَفْسٍ بِمَا تَسْعَىٰ
english translation text:
Indeed the Hour is bound to come: I will have it hidden, so that every soul may be rewarded for its endeavour.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَلَا يَصُدَّنَّكَ عَنْهَا مَن لَّا يُؤْمِنُ بِهَا وَاتَّبَعَ هَوَاهُ فَتَرْدَىٰ
english translation text:
So do not let yourself be distracted from it by those who do not believe in it and who follow their desires, or you will perish.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَمَا تِلْكَ بِيَمِينِكَ يَا مُوسَىٰ
english translation text:
‘Moses, what is that in your right hand?’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ هِيَ عَصَايَ أَتَوَكَّأُ عَلَيْهَا وَأَهُشُّ بِهَا عَلَىٰ غَنَمِي وَلِيَ فِيهَا مَآرِبُ أُخْرَىٰ
english translation text:
He said, ‘It is my staff. I lean on it, and with it I beat down leaves for my sheep; and I have other uses for it.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ أَلْقِهَا يَا مُوسَىٰ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Moses, throw it down.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَأَلْقَاهَا فَإِذَا هِيَ حَيَّةٌ تَسْعَىٰ
english translation text:
So he threw it down, and behold, it was a snake, moving swiftly.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ خُذْهَا وَلَا تَخَفْ ۖ سَنُعِيدُهَا سِيرَتَهَا الْأُولَىٰ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Take hold of it, and do not fear. We will restore it to its former state.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَاضْمُمْ يَدَكَ إِلَىٰ جَنَاحِكَ تَخْرُجْ بَيْضَاءَ مِنْ غَيْرِ سُوءٍ آيَةً أُخْرَىٰ
english translation text:
Now clasp your hand to your armpit: it will emerge white, without any harm—[this is yet] another sign,
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: لِنُرِيَكَ مِنْ آيَاتِنَا الْكُبْرَى
english translation text:
that We may show you some of Our great signs.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: اذْهَبْ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّهُ طَغَىٰ
english translation text:
Go to Pharaoh. He has indeed rebelled.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ رَبِّ اشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي
english translation text:
He said, ‘My Lord! Open my breast for me.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي
english translation text:
Make my task easy for me.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَاحْلُلْ عُقْدَةً مِّن لِّسَانِي
english translation text:
Remove the hitch from my tongue,
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: يَفْقَهُوا قَوْلِي
english translation text:
[so that] they may understand my speech.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَاجْعَل لِّي وَزِيرًا مِّنْ أَهْلِي
english translation text:
Appoint for me a minister from my family,
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: هَارُونَ أَخِي
english translation text:
Aaron, my brother.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: اشْدُدْ بِهِ أَزْرِي
english translation text:
Strengthen my back through him,
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَأَشْرِكْهُ فِي أَمْرِي
english translation text:
and make him my associate in my task,
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: كَيْ نُسَبِّحَكَ كَثِيرًا
english translation text:
so that we may glorify You greatly,
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَنَذْكُرَكَ كَثِيرًا
english translation text:
and remember You greatly.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِنَّكَ كُنتَ بِنَا بَصِيرًا
english translation text:
Indeed You see us best.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ قَدْ أُوتِيتَ سُؤْلَكَ يَا مُوسَىٰ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Moses, your request has been granted!
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ مَنَنَّا عَلَيْكَ مَرَّةً أُخْرَىٰ
english translation text:
Certainly, We have done you a favour another time,
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِذْ أَوْحَيْنَا إِلَىٰ أُمِّكَ مَا يُوحَىٰ
english translation text:
when We revealed to your mother whatever was to be revealed:
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: أَنِ اقْذِفِيهِ فِي التَّابُوتِ فَاقْذِفِيهِ فِي الْيَمِّ فَلْيُلْقِهِ الْيَمُّ بِالسَّاحِلِ يَأْخُذْهُ عَدُوٌّ لِّي وَعَدُوٌّ لَّهُ ۚ وَأَلْقَيْتُ عَلَيْكَ مَحَبَّةً مِّنِّي وَلِتُصْنَعَ عَلَىٰ عَيْنِي
english translation text:
“Put him in the casket, and cast it into the river. Then the river will cast it on the bank, and he shall be picked up by an enemy of Mine and an enemy of his.” And I made you endearing, and that you might be reared under My [watchful] eyes.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِذْ تَمْشِي أُخْتُكَ فَتَقُولُ هَلْ أَدُلُّكُمْ عَلَىٰ مَن يَكْفُلُهُ ۖ فَرَجَعْنَاكَ إِلَىٰ أُمِّكَ كَيْ تَقَرَّ عَيْنُهَا وَلَا تَحْزَنَ ۚ
english translation text:
When your sister walked up [to Pharaoh’s palace] saying, “Shall I show you someone who will take care of him?” Then We restored you to your mother, that she might not grieve and be comforted.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَقَتَلْتَ نَفْسًا فَنَجَّيْنَاكَ مِنَ الْغَمِّ وَفَتَنَّاكَ فُتُونًا ۚ فَلَبِثْتَ سِنِينَ فِي أَهْلِ مَدْيَنَ ثُمَّ جِئْتَ عَلَىٰ قَدَرٍ يَا مُوسَىٰ
english translation text:
Then you slew a soul, whereupon We delivered you from anguish, and We tried you with various ordeals. Then you stayed for several years among the people of Midian. Then you turned up as ordained, O Moses!
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَاصْطَنَعْتُكَ لِنَفْسِي
english translation text:
And I chose you for Myself.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: اذْهَبْ أَنتَ وَأَخُوكَ بِآيَاتِي وَلَا تَنِيَا فِي ذِكْرِي
english translation text:
‘Go ahead, you and your brother, with My signs and do not flag in My remembrance.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: اذْهَبَا إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّهُ طَغَىٰ
english translation text:
Both of you go to Pharaoh, for he has indeed rebelled.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَقُولَا لَهُ قَوْلًا لَّيِّنًا لَّعَلَّهُ يَتَذَكَّرُ أَوْ يَخْشَىٰ
english translation text:
Speak to him in a soft manner; maybe he will take admonition or fear.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَا رَبَّنَا إِنَّنَا نَخَافُ أَن يَفْرُطَ عَلَيْنَا أَوْ أَن يَطْغَىٰ
english translation text:
They said, ‘Our Lord! We are indeed afraid that he will forestall us or will exceed all bounds.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ لَا تَخَافَا ۖ إِنَّنِي مَعَكُمَا أَسْمَعُ وَأَرَىٰ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Do not be afraid, for I will be with the two of you, hearing and seeing [whatever happens].
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَأْتِيَاهُ فَقُولَا إِنَّا رَسُولَا رَبِّكَ فَأَرْسِلْ مَعَنَا بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ وَلَا تُعَذِّبْهُمْ ۖ قَدْ جِئْنَاكَ بِآيَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۖ وَالسَّلَامُ عَلَىٰ مَنِ اتَّبَعَ الْهُدَىٰ
english translation text:
So approach him and say, ‘‘We are the apostles of your Lord. Let the Children of Israel go with us, and do not torture them! We certainly bring you a sign from your Lord, and may peace be upon him who follows guidance!
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِنَّا قَدْ أُوحِيَ إِلَيْنَا أَنَّ الْعَذَابَ عَلَىٰ مَن كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
english translation text:
Indeed it has been revealed to us that punishment shall befall those who impugn us and turn their backs [on us].’’ ’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ فَمَن رَّبُّكُمَا يَا مُوسَىٰ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Who is your Lord, Moses?’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ رَبُّنَا الَّذِي أَعْطَىٰ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ خَلْقَهُ ثُمَّ هَدَىٰ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Our Lord is He who gave everything its creation and then guided it.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ فَمَا بَالُ الْقُرُونِ الْأُولَىٰ
english translation text:
He said, ‘What about the former generations?’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ عِلْمُهَا عِندَ رَبِّي فِي كِتَابٍ ۖ لَّا يَضِلُّ رَبِّي وَلَا يَنسَى
english translation text:
He said, ‘Their knowledge is with my Lord, in a Book. My Lord neither makes any error nor forgets.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: الَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُمُ الْأَرْضَ مَهْدًا وَسَلَكَ لَكُمْ فِيهَا سُبُلًا وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ السَّمَاءِ مَاءً فَأَخْرَجْنَا بِهِ أَزْوَاجًا مِّن نَّبَاتٍ شَتَّىٰ
english translation text:
He, who made the earth for you a cradle, and in it threaded for you ways, and sent down water from the sky, and with it We brought forth various kinds of vegetation.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: كُلُوا وَارْعَوْا أَنْعَامَكُمْ ۗ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَاتٍ لِّأُولِي النُّهَىٰ
english translation text:
‘Eat and pasture your cattle.’ There are indeed signs in that for those who have sense.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: مِنْهَا خَلَقْنَاكُمْ وَفِيهَا نُعِيدُكُمْ وَمِنْهَا نُخْرِجُكُمْ تَارَةً أُخْرَىٰ
english translation text:
From it did We create you, into it shall We return you, and from it shall We bring you forth another time.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ أَرَيْنَاهُ آيَاتِنَا كُلَّهَا فَكَذَّبَ وَأَبَىٰ
english translation text:
Certainly We showed him all Our signs. But he denied [them] and refused [to believe them].
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ أَجِئْتَنَا لِتُخْرِجَنَا مِنْ أَرْضِنَا بِسِحْرِكَ يَا مُوسَىٰ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Moses, have you come to us to expel us from our land with your magic?
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَلَنَأْتِيَنَّكَ بِسِحْرٍ مِّثْلِهِ فَاجْعَلْ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَكَ مَوْعِدًا لَّا نُخْلِفُهُ نَحْنُ وَلَا أَنتَ مَكَانًا سُوًى
english translation text:
Yet we [too] will bring you a magic like it! So fix a tryst between us and you, which neither we shall fail nor you, at a middle place.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ مَوْعِدُكُمْ يَوْمُ الزِّينَةِ وَأَن يُحْشَرَ النَّاسُ ضُحًى
english translation text:
He said, ‘Your tryst shall be the Day of Adornment, and let the people be assembled in early forenoon.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَتَوَلَّىٰ فِرْعَوْنُ فَجَمَعَ كَيْدَهُ ثُمَّ أَتَىٰ
english translation text:
Then Pharaoh withdrew [to consult privately], summoned up his guile, and then arrived [at the scene of the contest].
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰ وَيْلَكُمْ لَا تَفْتَرُوا عَلَى اللَّهِ كَذِبًا فَيُسْحِتَكُم بِعَذَابٍ ۖ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنِ افْتَرَىٰ
english translation text:
Moses said to them, ‘Woe to you! Do not fabricate lies against Allah, or He will obliterate you with a punishment. Whoever fabricates lies certainly fails.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَتَنَازَعُوا أَمْرَهُم بَيْنَهُمْ وَأَسَرُّوا النَّجْوَىٰ
english translation text:
So they disputed their matter among themselves, and kept their confidential talks secret.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالُوا إِنْ هَٰذَانِ لَسَاحِرَانِ يُرِيدَانِ أَن يُخْرِجَاكُم مِّنْ أَرْضِكُم بِسِحْرِهِمَا وَيَذْهَبَا بِطَرِيقَتِكُمُ الْمُثْلَىٰ
english translation text:
They said, ‘These two are indeed magicians who intend to expel you from your land with their magic, and to abolish your excellent tradition!
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَأَجْمِعُوا كَيْدَكُمْ ثُمَّ ائْتُوا صَفًّا ۚ وَقَدْ أَفْلَحَ الْيَوْمَ مَنِ اسْتَعْلَىٰ
english translation text:
So summon up your ingenuity, then come in ranks. Today he who has the upper hand will be felicitous!’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالُوا يَا مُوسَىٰ إِمَّا أَن تُلْقِيَ وَإِمَّا أَن نَّكُونَ أَوَّلَ مَنْ أَلْقَىٰ
english translation text:
They said, ‘O Moses! Will you throw first, or shall we?’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ بَلْ أَلْقُوا ۖ فَإِذَا حِبَالُهُمْ وَعِصِيُّهُمْ يُخَيَّلُ إِلَيْهِ مِن سِحْرِهِمْ أَنَّهَا تَسْعَىٰ
english translation text:
He said, ‘No, you throw first.’ Thereupon, behold, their ropes and staffs appeared to him by their magic to wriggle swiftly.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَأَوْجَسَ فِي نَفْسِهِ خِيفَةً مُّوسَىٰ
english translation text:
Then Moses felt a fear within his heart.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قُلْنَا لَا تَخَفْ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ الْأَعْلَىٰ
english translation text:
We said, ‘Do not be afraid. Indeed, you will have the upper hand.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَأَلْقِ مَا فِي يَمِينِكَ تَلْقَفْ مَا صَنَعُوا ۖ إِنَّمَا صَنَعُوا كَيْدُ سَاحِرٍ ۖ وَلَا يُفْلِحُ السَّاحِرُ حَيْثُ أَتَىٰ
english translation text:
Throw down what is in your right hand, and it will swallow what they have conjured. What they have conjured is only a magician’s trick, and the magician does not fare well wherever he may show up.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَأُلْقِيَ السَّحَرَةُ سُجَّدًا قَالُوا آمَنَّا بِرَبِّ هَارُونَ وَمُوسَىٰ
english translation text:
Thereat the magicians fell down prostrating. They said, ‘We have believed in the Lord of Aaron and Moses!’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ آمَنتُمْ لَهُ قَبْلَ أَنْ آذَنَ لَكُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُ لَكَبِيرُكُمُ الَّذِي عَلَّمَكُمُ السِّحْرَ ۖ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Did you believe in him before I should permit you? He is indeed your chief who has taught you magic!
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قفَلَأُقَطِّعَنَّ أَيْدِيَكُمْ وَأَرْجُلَكُم مِّنْ خِلَافٍ وَلَأُصَلِّبَنَّكُمْ فِي جُذُوعِ النَّخْلِ وَلَتَعْلَمُنَّ أَيُّنَا أَشَدُّ عَذَابًا وَأَبْقَىٰ
english translation text:
Surely, I will cut off your hands and feet from opposite sides, and I will crucify you on the trunks of palm trees, and you will know which of us can inflict a severer and more lasting punishment.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالُوا لَن نُّؤْثِرَكَ عَلَىٰ مَا جَاءَنَا مِنَ الْبَيِّنَاتِ وَالَّذِي فَطَرَنَا ۖ فَاقْضِ مَا أَنتَ قَاضٍ ۖ إِنَّمَا تَقْضِي هَٰذِهِ الْحَيَاةَ الدُّنْيَا
english translation text:
They said, ‘We will never prefer you to the clear proofs which have come to us, and to Him who originated us. Decide whatever you want to decide. You can only decide about the life of this world.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِنَّا آمَنَّا بِرَبِّنَا لِيَغْفِرَ لَنَا خَطَايَانَا وَمَا أَكْرَهْتَنَا عَلَيْهِ مِنَ السِّحْرِ ۗ وَاللَّهُ خَيْرٌ وَأَبْقَىٰ
english translation text:
We have indeed believed in our Lord that He may forgive us our offences and the magic you compelled us to perform. Allah is better and more lasting.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِنَّهُ مَن يَأْتِ رَبَّهُ مُجْرِمًا فَإِنَّ لَهُ جَهَنَّمَ لَا يَمُوتُ فِيهَا وَلَا يَحْيَىٰ
english translation text:
Whoever comes to his Lord laden with guilt, for him shall be hell, where he will neither live nor die.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَمَن يَأْتِهِ مُؤْمِنًا قَدْ عَمِلَ الصَّالِحَاتِ فَأُولَٰئِكَ لَهُمُ الدَّرَجَاتُ الْعُلَىٰ
english translation text:
But whoever comes to Him with faith and he has done righteous deeds, for such shall be the highest ranks
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: جَنَّاتُ عَدْنٍ تَجْرِي مِن تَحْتِهَا الْأَنْهَارُ خَالِدِينَ فِيهَا ۚ وَذَٰلِكَ جَزَاءُ مَن تَزَكَّىٰ
english translation text:
—the Gardens of Eden, with streams running in them, to abide in them [forever], and that is the reward of him who keeps pure.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ أَوْحَيْنَا إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِي فَاضْرِبْ لَهُمْ طَرِيقًا فِي الْبَحْرِ يَبَسًا لَّا تَخَافُ دَرَكًا وَلَا تَخْشَىٰ
english translation text:
We revealed to Moses, [saying], ‘Set out with My servants at night, and strike out for them a dry path through the sea. Do not be afraid of being overtaken, and have no fear [of getting drowned].
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَأَتْبَعَهُمْ فِرْعَوْنُ بِجُنُودِهِ فَغَشِيَهُم مِّنَ الْيَمِّ مَا غَشِيَهُمْ
english translation text:
Then Pharaoh pursued them with his troops, whereat they were engulfed by what engulfed them of the sea.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَأَضَلَّ فِرْعَوْنُ قَوْمَهُ وَمَا هَدَىٰ
english translation text:
Pharaoh led his people astray and did not guide them.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: يَا بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ قَدْ أَنجَيْنَاكُم مِّنْ عَدُوِّكُمْ وَوَاعَدْنَاكُمْ جَانِبَ الطُّورِ الْأَيْمَنَ وَنَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ الْمَنَّ وَالسَّلْوَىٰ
english translation text:
O Children of Israel! We delivered you from your enemy, and We appointed with you a tryst on the right side of the Mount and We sent down to you manna and quails:
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: كُلُوا مِن طَيِّبَاتِ مَا رَزَقْنَاكُمْ وَلَا تَطْغَوْا فِيهِ فَيَحِلَّ عَلَيْكُمْ غَضَبِي ۖ وَمَن يَحْلِلْ عَلَيْهِ غَضَبِي فَقَدْ هَوَىٰ
english translation text:
‘Eat of the good things We have provided you, but do not overstep the bounds therein, lest My wrath should descend on you, and he on whom My wrath descends certainly perishes.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَإِنِّي لَغَفَّارٌ لِّمَن تَابَ وَآمَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَالِحًا ثُمَّ اهْتَدَىٰ
english translation text:
Indeed I forgive those who repent, become faithful, act righteously, and follow guidance.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَمَا أَعْجَلَكَ عَن قَوْمِكَ يَا مُوسَىٰ
english translation text:
[God said,] ‘O Moses, what has prompted you to hasten ahead of your people?’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ هُمْ أُولَاءِ عَلَىٰ أَثَرِي وَعَجِلْتُ إِلَيْكَ رَبِّ لِتَرْضَىٰ
english translation text:
He said, ‘They are close upon my heels, and I hurried on to You, my Lord, that You may be pleased.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ فَإِنَّا قَدْ فَتَنَّا قَوْمَكَ مِن بَعْدِكَ وَأَضَلَّهُمُ السَّامِرِيُّ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Indeed We tried your people in your absence, and the Samiri has led them astray.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَرَجَعَ مُوسَىٰ إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِ غَضْبَانَ أَسِفًا ۚ قَالَ يَا قَوْمِ أَلَمْ يَعِدْكُمْ رَبُّكُمْ وَعْدًا حَسَنًا ۚ
english translation text:
Thereupon Moses returned to his people, indignant and grieved. He said, ‘O my people! Did your Lord not give you a true promise
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فأَفَطَالَ عَلَيْكُمُ الْعَهْدُ أَمْ أَرَدتُّمْ أَن يَحِلَّ عَلَيْكُمْ غَضَبٌ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ فَأَخْلَفْتُم مَّوْعِدِي
english translation text:
Did the period [of my absence] seem too long to you? Or did you desire that your Lord’s wrath should descend on you and so you failed your tryst with me?’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالُوا مَا أَخْلَفْنَا مَوْعِدَكَ بِمَلْكِنَا وَلَٰكِنَّا حُمِّلْنَا أَوْزَارًا مِّن زِينَةِ الْقَوْمِ فَقَذَفْنَاهَا فَكَذَٰلِكَ أَلْقَى السَّامِرِيُّ
english translation text:
They said, ‘We did not fail our tryst with you of our own accord, but we were laden with the weight of those people’s ornaments, and we cast them [into the fire] and so did the Samiri.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَأَخْرَجَ لَهُمْ عِجْلًا جَسَدًا لَّهُ خُوَارٌ فَقَالُوا هَٰذَا إِلَٰهُكُمْ وَإِلَٰهُ مُوسَىٰ فَنَسِيَ
english translation text:
Then he produced for them a calf—a [lifeless] body with a low—and they said, This is your god and the god of Moses, so he forgot!
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: أَفَلَا يَرَوْنَ أَلَّا يَرْجِعُ إِلَيْهِمْ قَوْلًا وَلَا يَمْلِكُ لَهُمْ ضَرًّا وَلَا نَفْعًا
english translation text:
Did they not see that it did not answer them, nor could it bring them any benefit or harm?
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ قَالَ لَهُمْ هَارُونُ مِن قَبْلُ يَا قَوْمِ إِنَّمَا فُتِنتُم بِهِ ۖ وَإِنَّ رَبَّكُمُ الرَّحْمَٰنُ فَاتَّبِعُونِي وَأَطِيعُوا أَمْرِي
english translation text:
Aaron had certainly told them earlier, ‘O my people! You are only being tested by it. Indeed your Lord is the All-beneficent. So follow me and obey my command!’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالُوا لَن نَّبْرَحَ عَلَيْهِ عَاكِفِينَ حَتَّىٰ يَرْجِعَ إِلَيْنَا مُوسَىٰ
english translation text:
They had said, ‘We will keep on clinging to it until Moses returns to us.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ يَا هَارُونُ مَا مَنَعَكَ إِذْ رَأَيْتَهُمْ ضَلُّوا
english translation text:
He said, ‘O Aaron! What kept you, when you saw them going astray,
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: أَلَّا تَتَّبِعَنِ ۖ أَفَعَصَيْتَ أَمْرِي
english translation text:
from following me? Did you disobey my command?’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ يَا ابْنَ أُمَّ لَا تَأْخُذْ بِلِحْيَتِي وَلَا بِرَأْسِي ۖ إِنِّي خَشِيتُ أَن تَقُولَ فَرَّقْتَ بَيْنَ بَنِي إِسْرَائِيلَ وَلَمْ تَرْقُبْ قَوْلِي
english translation text:
He said, ‘O son of my mother! Do not grab my beard or my head! I feared lest you should say, ‘‘You have caused a rift among the Children of Israel and did not heed my word [of advice].’’’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكَ يَا سَامِرِيُّ
english translation text:
He said, ‘What is your business, O Samiri?’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ بَصُرْتُ بِمَا لَمْ يَبْصُرُوا بِهِ فَقَبَضْتُ قَبْضَةً مِّنْ أَثَرِ الرَّسُولِ فَنَبَذْتُهَا وَكَذَٰلِكَ سَوَّلَتْ لِي نَفْسِي
english translation text:
He said, ‘I saw what they did not see. I took a handful [of dust] from the messenger’s trail and threw it. That is how my soul prompted me.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ فَاذْهَبْ فَإِنَّ لَكَ فِي الْحَيَاةِ أَن تَقُولَ لَا مِسَاسَ ۖ وَإِنَّ لَكَ مَوْعِدًا لَّن تُخْلَفَهُ ۖ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Begone! It shall be your [lot] throughout life to say, ‘‘Do not touch me!’’ Indeed, there is a tryst for you which you will not fail to keep!
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَانظُرْ إِلَىٰ إِلَٰهِكَ الَّذِي ظَلْتَ عَلَيْهِ عَاكِفًا ۖ لَّنُحَرِّقَنَّهُ ثُمَّ لَنَنسِفَنَّهُ فِي الْيَمِّ نَسْفًا
english translation text:
Now look at your god to whom you went on clinging. We will burn it down and then scatter it[s ashes] into the sea.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِنَّمَا إِلَٰهُكُمُ اللَّهُ الَّذِي لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۚ وَسِعَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ عِلْمًا
english translation text:
Indeed your God is Allah. There is no god except Him. He embraces all things in [His] knowledge.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: كَذَٰلِكَ نَقُصُّ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ أَنبَاءِ مَا قَدْ سَبَقَ ۚ وَقَدْ آتَيْنَاكَ مِن لَّدُنَّا ذِكْرًا
english translation text:
Thus do We relate to you some accounts of what is past. Certainly, We have given you a Reminder from Ourselves.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: مَّنْ أَعْرَضَ عَنْهُ فَإِنَّهُ يَحْمِلُ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ وِزْرًا
english translation text:
Whoever disregards it shall bear a burden [of punishment] on the Day of Resurrection,
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: خَالِدِينَ فِيهِ ۖ وَسَاءَ لَهُمْ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ حِمْلًا
english translation text:
remaining in it [forever]. Evil is their burden on the Day of Resurrection
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: يَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِي الصُّورِ ۚ وَنَحْشُرُ الْمُجْرِمِينَ يَوْمَئِذٍ زُرْقًا
english translation text:
—the day the Trumpet will be blown; on that day We shall muster the guilty with blind eyes.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: يَتَخَافَتُونَ بَيْنَهُمْ إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا عَشْرًا
english translation text:
They will whisper to one another: ‘You have stayed only for ten [days].’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ إِذْ يَقُولُ أَمْثَلُهُمْ طَرِيقَةً إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا يَوْمًا
english translation text:
We know best what they will say, when the smartest of them in approach will say, ‘You stayed only a day!’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَيَسْأَلُونَكَ عَنِ الْجِبَالِ فَقُلْ يَنسِفُهَا رَبِّي نَسْفًا
english translation text:
They question you concerning the mountains. Say, ‘My Lord will scatter them [like dust].’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَيَذَرُهَا قَاعًا صَفْصَفًا
english translation text:
Then He will leave it a level plain.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: لَّا تَرَىٰ فِيهَا عِوَجًا وَلَا أَمْتًا
english translation text:
You will not see any crookedness or unevenness in it.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَّبِعُونَ الدَّاعِيَ لَا عِوَجَ لَهُ ۖ وَخَشَعَتِ الْأَصْوَاتُ لِلرَّحْمَٰنِ فَلَا تَسْمَعُ إِلَّا هَمْسًا
english translation text:
On that day they will follow the summoner without zigzagging. Their voices will be muted before the All-beneficent, and you will hear nothing but a murmur.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا تَنفَعُ الشَّفَاعَةُ إِلَّا مَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُ الرَّحْمَٰنُ وَرَضِيَ لَهُ قَوْلًا
english translation text:
Intercession will not avail that day except from him whom the All-beneficent allows and approves of his word.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِهِ عِلْمًا
english translation text:
He knows what is before them and behind them, though they do not comprehend Him in their knowledge.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَعَنَتِ الْوُجُوهُ لِلْحَيِّ الْقَيُّومِ ۖ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنْ حَمَلَ ظُلْمًا
english translation text:
All faces shall be humbled before the Living One, the All-sustainer, and those who bear [the burden of] wrongdoing will fail.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِنَ الصَّالِحَاتِ وَهُوَ مُؤْمِنٌ فَلَا يَخَافُ ظُلْمًا وَلَا هَضْمًا
english translation text:
But whoever does righteous deeds, being faithful, will neither fear any injustice or disparagement.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَكَذَٰلِكَ أَنزَلْنَاهُ قُرْآنًا عَرَبِيًّا وَصَرَّفْنَا فِيهِ مِنَ الْوَعِيدِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَّقُونَ أَوْ يُحْدِثُ لَهُمْ ذِكْرًا
english translation text:
Thus We have sent it down as an Arabic Quran and We have paraphrased the warnings in it variously so that they may be Godwary, or it may prompt them to remembrance.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَتَعَالَى اللَّهُ الْمَلِكُ الْحَقُّ ۗ وَلَا تَعْجَلْ بِالْقُرْآنِ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يُقْضَىٰ إِلَيْكَ وَحْيُهُ ۖ وَقُل رَّبِّ زِدْنِي عِلْمًا
english translation text:
So exalted is Allah, the True Sovereign. Do not hasten with the Quran before its revelation is completed for you, and say, ‘My Lord! Increase me in knowledge.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَلَقَدْ عَهِدْنَا إِلَىٰ آدَمَ مِن قَبْلُ فَنَسِيَ وَلَمْ نَجِدْ لَهُ عَزْمًا
english translation text:
Certainly We had enjoined Adam earlier; but he forgot, and We did not find any resoluteness in him.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَإِذْ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ اسْجُدُوا لِآدَمَ فَسَجَدُوا إِلَّا إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰ
english translation text:
When We said to the angels, ‘Prostrate before Adam,’ they prostrated, but not Iblis: he refused.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَقُلْنَا يَا آدَمُ إِنَّ هَٰذَا عَدُوٌّ لَّكَ وَلِزَوْجِكَ فَلَا يُخْرِجَنَّكُمَا مِنَ الْجَنَّةِ فَتَشْقَىٰ
english translation text:
We said, ‘O Adam! This is indeed an enemy of yours and your mate’s. So do not let him expel you from paradise, or you will be miserable.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: إِنَّ لَكَ أَلَّا تَجُوعَ فِيهَا وَلَا تَعْرَىٰ
english translation text:
You will neither be hungry in it nor naked.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَأَنَّكَ لَا تَظْمَأُ فِيهَا وَلَا تَضْحَىٰ
english translation text:
You will neither be thirsty in it, nor suffer from [the heat of] the sun.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَوَسْوَسَ إِلَيْهِ الشَّيْطَانُ قَالَ يَا آدَمُ هَلْ أَدُلُّكَ عَلَىٰ شَجَرَةِ الْخُلْدِ وَمُلْكٍ لَّا يَبْلَىٰ
english translation text:
Then Satan tempted him. He said, ‘O Adam! Shall I show you the tree of immortality, and an imperishable kingdom?’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَأَكَلَا مِنْهَا فَبَدَتْ لَهُمَا سَوْآتُهُمَا وَطَفِقَا يَخْصِفَانِ عَلَيْهِمَا مِن وَرَقِ الْجَنَّةِ ۚ وَعَصَىٰ آدَمُ رَبَّهُ فَغَوَىٰ
english translation text:
So they both ate of it, and their nakedness became evident to them, and they began to stitch over themselves with the leaves of paradise. Adam disobeyed his Lord, and went amiss.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: ثُمَّ اجْتَبَاهُ رَبُّهُ فَتَابَ عَلَيْهِ وَهَدَىٰ
english translation text:
Then his Lord chose him, and turned to him clemently, and guided him.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ اهْبِطَا مِنْهَا جَمِيعًا ۖ بَعْضُكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ عَدُوٌّ ۖ فَإِمَّا يَأْتِيَنَّكُم مِّنِّي هُدًى فَمَنِ اتَّبَعَ هُدَايَ فَلَا يَضِلُّ وَلَا يَشْقَىٰ
english translation text:
He said, ‘Get down both of you from it, all together, being enemies of one another! Yet, should any guidance come to you from Me, those who follow My guidance will not go astray, nor will they be miserable.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَمَنْ أَعْرَضَ عَن ذِكْرِي فَإِنَّ لَهُ مَعِيشَةً ضَنكًا وَنَحْشُرُهُ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ أَعْمَىٰ
english translation text:
But whoever disregards My remembrance, his shall be a wretched life, and We shall raise him blind on the Day of Resurrection.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ رَبِّ لِمَ حَشَرْتَنِي أَعْمَىٰ وَقَدْ كُنتُ بَصِيرًا
english translation text:
He will say, ‘My Lord! Why have You raised me blind, though I used to see?’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قَالَ كَذَٰلِكَ أَتَتْكَ آيَاتُنَا فَنَسِيتَهَا ۖ وَكَذَٰلِكَ الْيَوْمَ تُنسَىٰ
english translation text:
He will say: ‘So it is. Our signs came to you, but you forgot them, and so you will be forgotten today.’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَكَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِي مَنْ أَسْرَفَ وَلَمْ يُؤْمِن بِآيَاتِ رَبِّهِ ۚ وَلَعَذَابُ الْآخِرَةِ أَشَدُّ وَأَبْقَىٰ
english translation text:
Thus do We requite those who transgress and do not believe in the signs of their Lord, and the punishment of the Hereafter is severer and more lasting.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: أَفَلَمْ يَهْدِ لَهُمْ كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّنَ الْقُرُونِ يَمْشُونَ فِي مَسَاكِنِهِمْ ۗ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَاتٍ لِّأُولِي النُّهَىٰ
english translation text:
Does it not dawn upon them how many generations We have destroyed before them, amid [the ruins of] whose dwellings they walk? There are indeed signs in this for those who have reason.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَلَوْلَا كَلِمَةٌ سَبَقَتْ مِن رَّبِّكَ لَكَانَ لِزَامًا وَأَجَلٌ مُّسَمًّى
english translation text:
Were it not for a prior decree of your Lord and a specified time, [their doom] would have attended [their guilt].
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: فَاصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ الشَّمْسِ وَقَبْلَ غُرُوبِهَا ۖ وَمِنْ آنَاءِ اللَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْ وَأَطْرَافَ النَّهَارِ لَعَلَّكَ تَرْضَىٰ
english translation text:
So be patient with what they say, and celebrate the praise of your Lord before the rising of the sun and before the sunset, and glorify Him in watches of the night and at the day’s ends, that you may be pleased.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَلَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيْنَيْكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعْنَا بِهِ أَزْوَاجًا مِّنْهُمْ زَهْرَةَ الْحَيَاةِ الدُّنْيَا لِنَفْتِنَهُمْ فِيهِ ۚ وَرِزْقُ رَبِّكَ خَيْرٌ وَأَبْقَىٰ
english translation text:
Do not extend your glance toward what We have provided certain groups of them as a glitter of the life of this world, so that We may test them thereby. The provision of your Lord is better and more lasting.
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَأْمُرْ أَهْلَكَ بِالصَّلَاةِ وَاصْطَبِرْ عَلَيْهَا ۖ لَا نَسْأَلُكَ رِزْقًا ۖ نَّحْنُ نَرْزُقُكَ ۗ وَالْعَاقِبَةُ لِلتَّقْوَىٰ
english translation text:
And bid your family to prayer and be steadfast in maintaining it. We do not ask any provision of you: it is We who provide for you, and to Godwariness belongs the ultimate outcome [in the Hereafter].
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَقَالُوا لَوْلَا يَأْتِينَا بِآيَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّهِ ۚ أَوَلَمْ تَأْتِهِم بَيِّنَةُ مَا فِي الصُّحُفِ الْأُولَىٰ
english translation text:
They say, ‘Why does he not bring us a sign from his Lord?’ Has there not come to them a clear proof in that which is in the former scriptures?
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: وَلَوْ أَنَّا أَهْلَكْنَاهُم بِعَذَابٍ مِّن قَبْلِهِ لَقَالُوا رَبَّنَا لَوْلَا أَرْسَلْتَ إِلَيْنَا رَسُولًا فَنَتَّبِعَ آيَاتِكَ مِن قَبْلِ أَن نَّذِلَّ وَنَخْزَىٰ
english translation text:
Had We destroyed them with a punishment before it, they would have surely said, ‘Our Lord! Why did You not send us an apostle so that we might have followed Your signs before we were abased and disgraced?’
Taha – Ta-Ha

arabic text: قُلْ كُلٌّ مُّتَرَبِّصٌ فَتَرَبَّصُوا ۖ فَسَتَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ أَصْحَابُ الصِّرَاطِ السَّوِيِّ وَمَنِ اهْتَدَىٰ
english translation text:
Say, ‘Everyone [of us] is waiting. So wait! Soon you will know who are the people of the right path, and who is [rightly] guided.’
Taha – Ta-Ha
